claimBoundary: Durable single-node PostgreSQL/PostGIS mixed spatial workload using pgbench prepared statements, weighted reads/writes, per-transaction latency logs, GiST plan checks, and SIGKILL recovery. This is production-oriented evidence, not a claim of multi-node high availability, cloud SLA, or universal capacity independent of the reported host.

dataset.name: NOAA IBTrACS v04r01 since1980 list CSV
